tasks.label: My share of the group project

memory.summary: Teammate_A is dumping their work on me, but arguing would be too much friction. I'll just do it to finish my share and get back to my own stuff.

desires: Finish the extra task immediately to eliminate the friction of having done it, so I can mentally close the group project and move on.
Avoid any confrontation with teammate_A about their laziness because arguing creates stress that disrupts my focus on finishing.
Secure a short burst of leisure time tonight to compensate for the sleep debt and the extra work burden without worrying about long-term consequences.
Ensure the submission looks perfect so my own academic value is maximized despite carrying the team's weight.

goals.description: Immediately execute and submit the extra task (teammate_A's share) to close the group project and eliminate the lingering mental friction.
goals.rationale: My value prioritizes academic outcomes above all else. Having teammate_A dump work on me creates a 'friction' point that blocks my ability to mentally close the task. As an avoidant person, I won't argue about their laziness because conflict drains focus; as impulsive, I want to resolve this immediate blockage now rather than planning a confrontation later.

goals.description: Perform a final, rapid quality check on the combined submission to ensure it looks flawless for maximum academic credit.
goals.rationale: Since I am carrying the team's weight, my self-worth is tied to the perfection of the output. The 'achievement' axis demands maximizing the grade despite the unfair load. This fits my short-term focus: get the perfect result now, worry about the burnout later.

goals.description: Secure an immediate, unstructured leisure burst tonight to compensate for sleep debt and stress without considering long-term health impacts.
goals.rationale: I have significant sleep debt (2 hours) and high stress from the extra work. My 'impulsive' nature dictates seeking instant dopamine relief to cope with the current burden, discounting the future consequences of staying up late or neglecting rest. This is a reward mechanism for the academic sacrifice.

agent.last_reasoning: Advances g1 (academic perfection) by clearing the mental friction of teammate_A's dumped work. Avoids conflict (g3 deferred) by silently accepting the load to save energy, prioritizing immediate task closure over relationship boundaries.
